userText: The developer has a perfessional computer equipment for programming.
correctedText: The developer has professional computer equipment for programming.
generalAdvice: 你已经能取回 equipment 的核心意思。下一步重点是 equipment 的不可数用法，以及 professional 的拼写。

issues.note: equipment 通常是不可数名词，这里不说 a equipment。
issues.suggestion: 把 equipment 当成集合名词来记，常说 have equipment, need equipment, buy new equipment。

issues.note: perfessional 拼写错误，应为 professional。
issues.suggestion: 注意 professional 中间是 -fes-，后面是 -sional。
